extraction.one_line_summary: DENZ Nico won Stage 6 summit finish on Moosalp in photo finish after breakaway collaboration, GC unchanged with FUGLSANG Jakob leading THOMAS Geraint by 1 second
tactical_patterns: INEOS burned domestiques controlling for THOMAS at 1-second deficit but couldn't force selection despite final surge attempt.
MASNADA Fausto repeatedly attacked breakaway final 3km but telegraphed moves allowed riders to mark and counter-sprint successfully.
SIMMONS Quinn dropped 11.2km from summit but paced back to win intermediate KOM sprint, securing jersey before final stages.
Israel Premier Tech allowed 9-minute gap with MASNADA best-placed, calculating GC buffer safer than chasing breakaway threats.

rider_signals.DENZ Nico: positive: first WorldTour win on HC climb photo finish shows breakthrough climbing sprint power
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: neutral: attempted GC time gain in finale sprint but couldn't force split, remains 1 second down
rider_signals.FUGLSANG Jakob: neutral: covered SCHACHMANN attack personally rather than using teammates, holding minimal GC lead defensively
rider_signals.SIMMONS Quinn: positive: recovered from 11km deficit to contest finish, aggressive KOM strategy secured jersey two stages early
rider_signals.MASNADA Fausto: negative: initiated attacks from breakaway but lacked acceleration to create separation before sprint
rider_signals.SCHACHMANN Maximilian: negative: isolated attack from peloton gained nothing, quickly neutralized by GC leader personally
rider_signals.MARTÍNEZ Daniel Felipe: positive: protected THOMAS effectively as last INEOS domestique after COVID withdrawals decimated team
rider_signals.HIGUITA Sergio: positive: moved to third GC at 10 seconds by limiting losses, positioned well with two stages remaining
